system.description:
Stalker Unit is the Drone Commander discipline for runners who chose to invest everything in a single, irreplaceable hunter-killer. Practitioners spend years tuning one platform: a four-legged kinetic chassis, a high-altitude raptor drone, a silent quadruped infiltrator. The Stalker is not disposable. It is an extension of the Commander's will, and it is the most dangerous single object on most jobs.

On the job, the Stalker Unit commander is the runner whose teammate is also a chassis. Their entry feature is Hunter Bond: their Stalker drone is a full combat companion that levels with them, possesses a unique role specialization (kinetic, sensor, stealth, or assault), and may be repaired between sessions rather than replaced.
system.grants: Hunter Bond: persistent Stalker drone companion; chosen role specialization; repairable between sessions.

wizard.tagline: Build one perfect killer and walk beside it
